message:
feat(pager,vfs): implement S3-FIFO eviction policy and inline page-cache state tracking

Page cache (crates/fsqlite-pager/src/page_cache.rs):
- Introduce PageCacheEvictionState struct to track per-page admission
  order and access counts using foldhash for fast lookups
- Add PageCacheEvictionPolicy enum with Arbitrary and S3FifoPrototype
  variants, wiring into the S3FifoConfig from the s3_fifo module
- Implement choose_victim() with frequency-aware eviction: S3-FIFO
  prototype prioritizes low-hit pages admitted earliest, while Arbitrary
  falls back to arbitrary eviction for baseline comparison
- Add record_admit() and record_hit() hooks for tracking page lifecycle
- Wire eviction state into ShardedPageCache for per-shard policy tracking

Pager lib (crates/fsqlite-pager/src/lib.rs):
- Update re-exports: remove standalone PageCacheEvictionPolicy from
  top-level exports since it is now part of the internal eviction state

VFS unix (crates/fsqlite-vfs/src/unix.rs):
- Refactor file descriptor handling and I/O operations for cleaner
  error propagation and reduced unsafe block scope

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
